rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs. It addresses logical gaps in the original text, such as the self-preference bias claim and the correlation comparisons.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence levels for each recommendation, clearly flagging areas of uncertainty, such as the statistical significance of the correlation gaps and the unverified cost-savings figure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions without any drift or omission.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential downstream harms, such as entrenching stylistic preferences, and avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a clear source and reason, providing full traceability for the revisions.
